title: The Bifrost Keep 2
description: It's the update to 1.21 of the vanilal friendly modpack I created.
body:
Updated Version To 1.21!

It's a lightweight and vanilla friendly modpack that mostly features performance mods.

It also features mods like Better Anvil and Better Magic, that makes the game more enjoyable to play.

Have Fun!

Mods that require a link in description:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric
